name: Caverion Oyj
summary: Caverion Oyj, together with its subsidiaries, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a service company in building systems, construction services, and services for industry in Northern, Central, and Eastern Europe. It designs, builds, operates, and maintains technical solutions for buildings and industries. The company provides range of services, including technical maintenance, facility management, smart technologies, advisory, and industrial maintenance services; and delivers building technology projects, such as smart technologies, design and build competence, and integrated life cycle deliveries comprising of maintenance and updates, as well as project management, prefabrication, project planning, and execution. Its services are used in offices and retail properties, housing, public premises, industrial plants and infrastructure, and other places. The company serves the public sector, various industries, real estate investors and developers, real estate users, and general contractors. Caverion Oyj was founded in 1912 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.
